OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Line 9
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development is present. Represented by Raven Dunn.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Richard Kueneman is present.
Attorney Jeff Dulgar appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of January 17, 2017 is vacated. (501)
